name: Caribbean Confederation of Credit Unions (CCCU)
description: CCCU was established as the successor to the West Indies Conference of Credit Societies (WICCS) and serves as the apex trade and development organization for credit unions and national co-operative organisations in the Caribbean. Their main objectives are to: Advocacy Capacity-building Marketing Mobilize financial and technical resources for development Individual members 2012: 1,940,668 Individual members 2011: 1,892,539 Member societies 2012: 239
